---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Zileo Docs
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Index document '...'
2. Call MCP tool '...' with arguments '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include the JSON-RPC error payload or REST response if relevant.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, Fedora 43, macOS 14, Windows 11 + WSL2]
- Docker version: [e.g., Docker 27.x]
- Zileo Docs version: [e.g., v0.4.0]
- Python version (if running outside Docker): [e.g., 3.11.9]
- MCP client: [e.g., Claude Desktop, Zileo Chat, custom]

## Logs
```
docker compose logs zileo-docs --tail 100
```

## Additional Context
Document type and approximate size if relevant (PDF / Excel / Word — pages, MB). **Do not paste real document content if confidential.**
